title: Crayon Object Carrier
description: A reference-dependent series where one childlike crayon stick figure stays consistent while carrying different photoreal objects on the same paper surface.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the flat crayon character, paper texture, and lighting direction. Images 02-04 keep that handmade 2D actor and replace the held object with physically plausible 3D materials that cast real shadows onto the paper.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Crayon Object Carrier
en.description: A reference-dependent series where one childlike crayon stick figure stays consistent while carrying different photoreal objects on the same paper surface.

zh-CN.title: 蜡笔搬运者
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的系列: 同一个儿童蜡笔小人保持一致,在纸面上托举不同的真实三维物体。
